category_sources: Official pymol.org page describes PyMOL as a molecular visualization system maintained and distributed by Schrodinger.
display_name_sources: Official site uses the display name PyMOL.
docs_sources: Official open-source GitHub README is an additional documentation surface.
Official pymol.org legacy documentation is hosted at https://pymol.org/dokuwiki/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official pymol.org page describes viewing, rendering, animating, and exporting 3D molecular structures.
source_facts.repo points to Schrodinger's open-source PyMOL repository.
